caption: A man wearing glasses, a light-colored shirt, a tie, and a dark blue suit jacket stands in a professional indoor setting with a blurred white and gray background. In the initial frames, a graphic overlay appears at the bottom of the screen containing the text "MONGODB WORLD 2022", "#MDW22 | #theCUBE", and "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY", alongside a blue cube logo. A separate "Sponsored By MongoDB" logo is visible on the right. The man is speaking and smiling towards the camera. The scene then transitions to a dark blue digital background featuring circuit-like patterns. This screen displays a blue cube logo with the text "go to theCUBE.net" and a red YouTube play button icon next to the text "Subscribe to iconANGLE theCUBE".
